newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The bullish data points - record Q1 (NT$200.3B, +27.6% YoY; servers >50% of revenue), record March monthly print, and 2026 AI-server growth set to surpass 2025 - are mid-May vintage and already priced. The stock drifted -6% over the two weeks.

sources.label: BigGo - Inventec Q1 2026 record, servers >50% of revenue
DIGITIMES - Inventec strong AI/general server demand through 2028

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha lens: no fresh post-June-9 evidence; the record Q1, >50% server mix and 2026>2025 AI-server guidance are mid-May and already priced. At +48% YTD with a modest two-week pullback the setup is unchanged from the prior hold; balanced AI exposure keeps rank 14 in the secondary bucket.
verdicts.bull: AI-server ODM with servers now >50% of revenue and 2026 AI growth set to exceed 2025; demand visibility through 2028.
verdicts.neutral: Solid AI exposure but ODM economics are thin and the story is already well known.
verdicts.bear: China clients are >50% of AI-server revenue (concentration/policy risk); little fresh catalyst to extend residual alpha.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI-server shipment ramp and rising server mix
